Some officials view the conflict as a divine mission. This echoes historical religious wars. Iran's government is also religiously rooted. The US is invoking religious themes in its foreign policy.

topStories.title: Two-worded message & an old pic - Vanessa Trump breaks her silence on boyfriend Tiger Woods' crash, DUI arrest
topStories.description: Tiger Woods made his and Vanessa Trump's relationship public on Instagram in March 2025

topStories.title: One crew member rescued by special forces says US officials after Iran shoots down American F-15 fighter jet
topStories.description: Most Americans favor a swift end to US involvement in the conflict, according to a recent poll. The downing of an F-15E fighter jet in Iran led to one crew member's rescue, with ongoing concerns about potential US military personnel capture affecting public opinion.

topStories.title: Election petitions must be decided on the basis of material on record: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The order was based on an appeal challenging a February 2025 Punjab and Haryana High Court order on elections to the post of sarpanch of gram panchayat Khalila Majra at Panipat

topStories.title: 'Capture Enemy Pilots Alive': Iran Channel Issues Reward After US Jet Downed - NDTV
topStories.description: 'Capture Enemy Pilots Alive': Iran Channel Issues Reward After US Jet Downed  NDTV

topStories.title: US rescues one crew member of F-15E fighter jet shot down by Iran; Tehran asks for civilian help: Report
topStories.description: According to the reports, Israel is helping the US with search and rescue operation of the crew member.

topStories.title: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
topStories.description: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".

topStories.title: Who is Christopher LaNeve? Pete Hegseth's aide likely to become US' acting Army Chief of Staff
topStories.description: The Pentagon reportedly confirmed that George, who had more than a year left in his term, “will be retiring from his position as the 41st Chief of Staff of the Army effective immediately.”

topStories.title: Honorary doctorates to politicians raises eyebrows
topStories.description: The two politicians are Congress MLC K. Govindaraj and B.M. Farooq, an industrialist from Mangaluru identified with the Janata Dal (Secular)

topStories.title: US launches search and rescue operation after its F-15E fighter jet shot down in Iran amid ongoing conflict
topStories.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first combat loss of a US jet in the ongoing conflict. A rescue operation is underway for the crew, according to an US official. The Iranian state media posted map of Iran highlighting the area where two pilots are being hunted for since morning.

topStories.title: Trump seeks massive $1.5tn for defence alongside cuts in domestic spending
topStories.description: The president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

dailyNews.title: Iran rejects US' 48-hour ceasefire proposal, push was made by another country - Report
dailyNews.description: Iran rejects US' 48-hour ceasefire proposal, push was made by another country - Report

dailyNews.title: Trump seeks massive $1.5tn for defence alongside cuts in domestic spending
dailyNews.description: The president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

dailyNews.title: US intelligence believes Iran still has ‘significant’ missile launching capabilities as the war continues
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel's Operation Epic Fury targets Iran's missile capabilities. After 35 days of conflict, US intelligence reveals that nearly half of Iran’s missile launchers remain, contradicting earlier assertions of extensive damage.

dailyNews.title: Cuba to release more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
dailyNews.description: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.

dailyNews.title: 5 Indians among 12 injured in Abu Dhabi after falling debris hits Ajban area
dailyNews.description: Eight Indians have been killed and dozens more injured in countries across the region since the Israel and the US’s military strikes on Iran on February 28

dailyNews.title: ‘Hand over enemy pilot’: Iranian state TV affiliate claims a US pilot ejected from their aircraft over southwestern Iran
dailyNews.description: An on-screen crawl earlier urged the public to ‘shoot them if you see them,’ referring to social media footage circulating of what appeared to be US aircraft in the area, reports stated

dailyNews.title: US jobs surge unexpectedly in March despite Iran war
dailyNews.description: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.

dailyNews.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
dailyNews.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

dailyNews.title: Pete Hegseth asks US Army's top general to step down
dailyNews.description: Gen Randy George was nominated for the role in 2023 by former President Joe Biden.

dailyNews.title: Vance tapped as ‘fraud czar’ as Trump targets blue states over taxpayer theft
dailyNews.description: Amid several monumental cabinet shakeups, President Donald Trump is signaling his continued confidence in Vice President JD Vance by having him address an “unprecedented" problem and officially declaring him the “FRAUD CZAR."

dailyNews.title: Pritzker calls on Trump officials to testify over ICE crackdown, White House blasts move as ‘political stunt’
dailyNews.description: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker calls on Trump administration officials to testify before his commission targeting ICE enforcement operations in the state.

dailyNews.title: 'Save Women's Sports' activists thank Pam Bondi for Title IX enforcement after her departure from DOJ
dailyNews.description: Advocates commend Pam Bondi's significant impact on the national movement to save women's sports as she steps away as U.S. attorney general.

dailyNews.title: Iran, proxy militias threaten US universities in Lebanon as Americans urged to flee now
dailyNews.description: Iran and its proxy militias have threatened universities in Lebanon, U.S. officials say, and the State Department warned Americans to depart immediately.

dailyNews.title: Former Syracuse basketball player to be deported after spending weeks in ICE custody
dailyNews.description: Former Syracuse basketball player John Bol Ajak, in the country illegally, is being deported to Sudan after spending several weeks in ICE custody after several arrests.

topStories.title: Homan vows immigration mission 'won't skip a beat' as Bondi exits DOJ
topStories.description: Border czar Tom Homan said the Trump administration will ramp up immigration enforcement despite AG Pam Bondi's departure from her Cabinet role.

topStories.title: Cuba releases 2,000 prisoners amid Trump pressure, energy crisis
topStories.description: Cuba's government releases over 2,000 prisoners citing good behavior and health conditions as U.S. sanctions worsen the island's economic crisis.

topStories.title: Pam Bondi is out as AG — here are the contenders who could replace her
topStories.description: President Donald Trump tapped Todd Blanche as acting attorney general after ousting Pam Bondi, but several contenders are emerging for the permanent role, including Lee Zeldin.

topStories.title: Left-wing host says AOC uses ‘Trump-like’ attacks on media critics in voting record dispute
topStories.description: Ana Kasparian detailed her clash with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, arguing the congresswoman responded with “Trump-like" rhetoric after criticism over Israel funding and past House votes.

topStories.title: Hegseth Says U.S. Troops Are Fighting for Jesus. The Pope Disagrees.
topStories.description: In sharp contrast to the Trump administration’s calls for Christian prayers for the war effort, Pope Leo XIV says military domination is “entirely foreign to the way of Jesus Christ.”

topStories.title: Pam Bondi Wanted a Graceful Exit. But Trump Wanted Her Gone.
topStories.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

dailyNews.title: Trump to sign executive order to expand NCAA's control over college sports
dailyNews.description: The executive order is expected to increase the NCAA's control over college sports and threaten to remove federal funding for colleges and universities that don't comply with NCAA rules.

dailyNews.title: White House reacts to F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Responds After Trump Fires Her as Attorney General
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced on Thursday that he has fired Pam Bondi as Attorney General and said she will be transitioning to a “new job in the private sector.” Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who once served as Trump’s personal defense lawyer during his hush money trial in New York, is set to replace her as acting attorney general. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Kristen Welker, moderator of Meet the Press, joins TODAY with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Evangelical churches who backed Trump now feel like 'collateral' in his deportation agenda
dailyNews.description: Amid ICE arrests and detentions, attendance has dropped and churches have closed. 'You're deporting the future of American Christianity,' a Latino evangelical leader said.

dailyNews.title: White House asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion for defense in new budget request
dailyNews.description: The White House is asking Congress to approve roughly $1.5 trillion for defense -- a record-breaking amount as the U.S. remains in its fifth week of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
